the availability and/or cost of raw materials and labor used in construction
complexities associated with combining independent companies with separate businesses, customers, employees, cultures and systems

we recorded impairment of assets and lease terminations expense of $13.6 million

our corporate headquarters in Calabasas, California, an area that is prone to and has been impacted by natural disasters such as earthquakes and wildfires

notes: Chunk contains a single event: 10-K 0001410578-25-000195 part 2 of 6 (Risk Factors section); fiscal_kpis is null in this chunk so no KPI rewrites.
labor_cost and labor_availability are two independent causal variables named in one sentence (rising cost AND scarcity of labor); split per R2.

information_technology_outage coined without the vendor label (CrowdStrike) per R7 ban on provider names; cybersecurity_incident kept separate as the malicious-attack class (credential stuffing) vs accidental IT outage.
All 27 evidence quotes verified verbatim substrings of the event content (including curly quotes).

Skipped as vague/ungrounded (8): generative-AI adoption (speculative 'may incorporate'), generic laws-or-regulations compliance (category-level cross-reference), sales deleveraging / infrastructure scaling, international licensee operating performance, landlord financial viability (sub-factor of site availability), consumer boycott/activism (about companies generally, not grounded as a CAKE cause), brand expansion to retail items (vague initiative), Cheesecake Rewards loyalty-program reliance (no causal claim).
